title: Review the uncommitted changes. Context: # Coder Handoff ## Task Review failed: review score 4/10 (min 7) issues to fix: - Then list up to 5 concrete fix items, one per line, using numbered or '-' bullets. - If score >= 7, do not include an issues list. - Format your final line EXACTLY as: SCORE: N/...
summary_text: ISSUES TO FIX: 1. [freee-client.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/freee-client.mjs#L155) now hard-fails every call when `FREEE_CLIENT_ID`/`FREEE_CLIENT_SECRET` are missing from env or Keychain, but the existing auth flow still supports config-backed credentials in [freee-oauth.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/freee-oauth.mjs#L13); this regresses config-only setups that used to work. 2. [eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L347) removed the CJK/non-command skip from bash-fence parsing, so Japanese prose inside ```bash examples is now scored as `PHANTOM_CMD`; a minimal repro with a fenced line `実行コマンド` now incurs `check2_phantom_cmds: -5`, which will under-score existing JP skill docs. 3. [note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/note-generate/scripts/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L523) resolves `MANUS_API_KEY` first and then writes that single value back into both `MANUS_API_KEY` and `MANUS_MCP_API_KEY`; if the first key is stale but the MCP key is valid, the valid fallback is overwritten and the Manus path still fails. 4. [context-monitor.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/context-monitor.sh#L17) weakens the safety behavior by doubling the threshold from 30 to 60 and replacing the immediate handover warning with a passive `/compact` suggestion, while still logging `action":"handover_suggested"` and using `.handover-suggest-flag`; the behavior and recorded state are now inconsistent. 5. [note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/note-generate/scripts/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L97) silently probes and decrypts secrets from machine-local `~/Dev/*/secrets/fugue-secrets.enc`; that is a cross-project secret dependency with no explicit opt-in, which is a security and portability regression for a local thumbnail script. SCORE: 4/10
